subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath soared upon the wings of faith unto God, the One, the Single, the Mighty, the All-Praised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن طار باجنحه الایمان الی الله الفرد الواحد العزیز الحمید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
